name: The Senator's Daughter and The Activist
overview: Sam is a friendly communications student and party girl from a wealthy political family. Clyden is a studious but snobby med student who hates Sam’s family. But one day, these opposites suddenly find themselves arranged to be married, with seemingly no way to escape.

name: The House on Ligaya Street
overview: Sam and Clyden are forced to live together. Now, their already contentious relationship gets even worse as they try to adjust to each other’s very different lifestyles.

name: Maui
overview: Sam and Clyden start to get along. But as their bond deepens and their friendship grows, does their deal to break off the engagement still stand?

name: Backburner?
overview: Sam is in denial of having any feelings for Clyden. But when she finds herself jealous of Clyden’s closeness with a female classmate, Sam just grows more confused.

name: For Real This Time
overview: After the unexpected kiss from Clyden, Sam distances herself from him in hopes of figuring out her feelings. But a surprise visit from Clyden makes it harder to deny the truth any longer.

name: When You Know, You Know
overview: As Clyden admits that he thinks he’s fallen in love with Sam, their relationship grows even deeper. On the other hand, Sam’s relationship with half-sister Naomi turns for the worse. With Clyden’s support, can Sam turn her relationship with her sister around?

name: Nothing Like The First Time
overview: Sam and Clyden are officially together, and Sam and Naomi have finally made up. But just as things have gone great for Sam, Clyden seems to have forgotten about her birthday.

name: Better Days
overview: Sam and Clyden’s love grows deeper as they continue to celebrate important moments together. But as they also pursue their dreams together, their families aren’t as supportive.

name: The Beginning of the End
overview: Sam and Clyden are finally starting to live their dreams. But that also means having less time for each other. Can they be there for each other when a huge scandal tests their families?

name: See You Around
overview: After Clyden’s mom’s plea for Sam and Clyden to break up, Sam gets another devastating news. And this time, there might be no saving their relationship.

name: The Supermodel And The Doctor
overview: It’s been four years since Sam and Clyden’s break up. They have finally achieved their dreams. And now, it seems fate is leading them back to each other. But have they already moved on?

name: A Little Hope Never Hurt
overview: When Sam falls ill, she finds herself being taken care of by Clyden once again. Is this the start of a rekindling of their romance?

name: All The Things Left Unsaid
overview: Sam meets up with Clyden in the guise of friendly hang outs. But as they do so, their past keeps coming up. Will they finally be able to talk about all their hang-ups from the past?

name: All We Have Is Now
overview: As Sam’s best friend, Yanna, is set to get married, she ponders on her relationship with Clyden. Is there still a future for them when she’s about to leave for New York?

name: Everything We Left Behind
overview: A video of Sam admitting her relationship with Clyden spreads like wildfire. And with netizens speculating on the seemingly questionable relationship and digging into her past, Sam receives a ton of backlash. Will their relationship once again fall apart due to a scandal?

name: Finally Free
overview: It’s been three years since Sam left the Philippines. But now, she’s back for good, opening a new club, and starting a new life. Will Clyden be a part of Sam’s new life or will they never get their happily ever after?
